skills.name: Free AEO Audit
skills.description: Instant Answer Engine Optimization (AEO) audit for any website. Returns a 0-100 score, grade A-F, and prioritized recommendations for AI visibility in ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, and Google AI Overview. Free, no signup required. Tuned for Norwegian B2B SaaS but works for any URL.

endpoints.description: MCP tool analyze_aeo({url}) returns the same audit

skills.name: AEO Implementation for B2B SaaS
skills.description: Full AEO implementation for Norwegian B2B SaaS: SoftwareApplication schema.org markup, alternative-to and integration pages, AI-optimized buyer-question content, ongoing monitoring. Pricing (four tiers): Synlig Lite 990 NOK (one-time, FAQPage JSON-LD for one page, 1 business day), AI-synlighetsanalyse 4 900 NOK (one-time), AI-synlighetsfundament 14 900 NOK (one-time, includes implementation), Løpende overvåking 4 900 NOK/month (3-month minimum). Order via web form, EHF invoice within 24h.

endpoints.description: Order form, preselects the AI-synlighetsfundament tier
